Experiments

Run Small Tests.
Learn What Actually Works.

CCC helps users run simple real-life experiments around sleep, hydration, food, training, recovery, and consistency — then track what actually improves readiness.

Join Early Access View Dashboard

Why Experiments Matter

Most people guess. CCC helps users test one variable at a time and see the result.

  • Did more hydration improve readiness?
  • Did better sleep help recovery?
  • Did higher protein improve energy?
  • Did walking after meals help digestion?
  • Did reducing stress improve performance?
Sleep Hydration Protein Recovery

How CCC Experiments Work

Keep it simple. Change one thing. Watch what happens.

1

Pick One Variable

Choose a simple test like hydration, protein timing, bedtime, or walking after meals.

2

Track Consistently

Log signals for a few days so CCC can compare before and after patterns.

3

See the Result

Review changes in readiness, energy, recovery, digestion, and consistency.

Suggested Experiments

Start with practical tests that can change how you feel within days.

7-Day Hydration Test

Increase hydration consistency and see whether readiness, energy, and headaches improve.

Protein First Breakfast

Test whether a higher-protein first meal improves satiety and afternoon energy.

Earlier Sleep Window

Move bedtime earlier for one week and compare recovery, soreness, and focus.

Walk After Meals

Use short post-meal walks to test digestion, blood sugar stability, and mental clarity.

Low-Stress Morning

Delay phone and email for the first hour and track whether mood and productivity improve.

Recovery Week

Reduce training intensity for a week and see whether readiness rebounds more than expected.

Bad Experiment Habits

  • Changing too many things at once
  • Tracking inconsistently
  • Quitting too early
  • Ignoring obvious patterns
  • Guessing instead of measuring

Better Experiment Habits

  • One variable at a time
  • Track for several days
  • Compare before and after
  • Use readiness as feedback
  • Repeat what works

What CCC Helps You Discover

  • Which habit gives the biggest return
  • What is hurting readiness the most
  • How quickly a change starts helping
  • Which routine is worth keeping
  • What actually improves your best days
Start Testing With CCC
Turn curiosity into better daily results.
Join early access and start using simple experiments to improve readiness, performance, and recovery.
